kinds.idle: Trigger when the system remains idle.
kinds.generation_below: Trigger when generation falls below the configured threshold.
kinds.consumption_above: Trigger when consumption exceeds the configured threshold.
kinds.net_power_above: Trigger when net power exceeds the configured threshold.
kinds.standby_cost_above: Trigger when standby cost exceeds the configured threshold.
kinds.performance_below: Trigger when performance falls below the configured threshold.
kinds.battery_below: Trigger when battery level falls below the configured threshold.
kinds.extended_below: Trigger after an extended period below the threshold.
kinds.extended_above: Trigger after an extended period above the threshold.

equipmentCatalog.title: Equipment templates
equipmentCatalog.description: Optionally prefill editable equipment values from the bundled offline catalog, or enter every value manually.
equipmentCatalog.inverterPlaceholder: For example SMA, Fronius or Huawei
equipmentCatalog.modulePlaceholder: For example manufacturer or 450 W model
equipmentCatalog.error: The equipment catalog could not be loaded. Manual entry remains available.
equipmentCatalog.empty: No matching catalog entry. Continue with manual entry.
equipmentCatalog.moduleData: Confirmed module and string technical data
equipmentCatalog.snapshotGuidance: Every prefilled field remains editable. Saving stores this confirmed snapshot; later catalog releases do not change it.
equipmentCatalog.provenanceLegend: Provenance: manual, copied, customized, or an older template revision.
equipmentCatalog.validationError: The confirmed values are invalid. Review the marked snapshot values.

onboarding.awaitingVerification: Send a test observation to verify ingestion.
onboarding.secretGuidance: Copy this credential now. It will not be shown again.
onboarding.title: Set up PVLog
onboarding.verified: Test ingestion was accepted and verified.

page.description: Review weather-based potential generation and compare it with measured output.
page.title: PV yield forecasting

forward.description: Potential generation based on predicted weather; this is modeled data, not a measurement.
forward.emptyDescription: No modeled points exist for the selected horizon.
forward.errorDescription: Actual telemetry remains available while the weather or calculation service recovers.
forward.partialDescription: Values may cover only part of the configured nameplate capacity or use an older weather run. Capacity and freshness are shown below.
forward.tableCaption: Forward forecast values with uncertainty and coverage
forward.textSummary: The current forecast models {{energy}} kWh and a peak of {{peak}} kW using weather attributed to {{attribution}}.
forward.title: Forward power forecast

performance.description: Actual energy is aligned with historical expected generation and with the forecast that was issued beforehand. These ratios are not inverter conversion efficiency.
performance.errorDescription: The aligned measured and modeled series could not be loaded.

forecast_realization.description: Actual generation divided by the weather forecast issued before the interval.
forecast_realization.explanation: Shows forecast accuracy and operational outcome together; it does not describe DC-to-AC inverter efficiency.
forecast_realization.title: Forecast realization

generation_performance.description: Actual generation divided by expected generation reconstructed from observed or reanalysis weather.
generation_performance.explanation: Shows system generation performance against weather-adjusted potential; it does not describe DC-to-AC inverter efficiency.
generation_performance.title: Generation performance

performance.noData: No aligned intervals meet the coverage requirements. Missing values remain unavailable and are not displayed as zero.
performance.tableCaption: Actual and modeled generation with an explicit availability reason
performance.title: Expected versus actual generation

completeness.description: Checks location, module, orientation, capacity, and modeling inputs for the effective period.
completeness.noGaps: All required forecast inputs are present.
completeness.title: Forecast input readiness

reasons.incompatible_input_run: The weather run is incompatible with this configuration.
reasons.missing_forecast_settings: Forecast loss and calibration settings are missing.
reasons.missing_module_capacity: A PV string is missing module capacity.
reasons.missing_module_identity: A PV string is missing its module identity.
reasons.missing_orientation: A PV string is missing its orientation.
reasons.missing_tilt: A PV string is missing its tilt.
reasons.missing_weather_input: No suitable weather input is available.
reasons.no_effective_equipment: No effective PV equipment exists for this period.
reasons.non_positive_expected_energy: Expected generation is not positive for this interval.
reasons.partial_effective_capacity: Only part of the effective nameplate capacity can be modeled.
reasons.unsupported_weather_input: The weather input contains unsupported data.

settings.description: Apply bounded losses and calibration from the selected effective time without changing measured telemetry or confirmed equipment.
settings.saveError: The settings could not be saved. Reload and try again.
settings.saved: Settings saved; affected forecasts will be recalculated.
settings.title: Effective loss and calibration settings

delete.description: {{name}} and its configuration will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.title: Delete this system?

errors.saveDescription: The changes could not be saved. Check your input and try again.
errors.saveForbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to save systems in this account.
errors.saveUnavailableDescription: The save service is currently unavailable. Try again later.
errors.saveValidationDescription: The server rejected the system data. Check the system name and time zone and try again.

accountApiKeys.createDescription: Choose only the permissions required by this integration. Permissions never imply one another.
accountApiKeys.createError: The API key could not be created. Check the name, permissions, and expiry.
accountApiKeys.description: Create separate, revocable credentials for integrations without sharing your password or granting unnecessary system access.
accountApiKeys.empty: No account API keys have been created yet.
accountApiKeys.expiryHint: Leave empty for a key without automatic expiry.
accountApiKeys.listDescription: Only safe metadata is shown. API key secrets cannot be viewed again.

accountApiKeys.nameRequired: Enter a name for the API key.
accountApiKeys.revokeDescription: This integration will immediately lose access. Other API keys are not affected.
